title: Methods of operating wireless terminals and related wireless terminals
abstract: The present disclosure provides wireless terminals and methods of operating wireless terminals. According to an exemplary embodiment, a wireless terminal using a first carrier and a second carrier may receive (801) system information over the second carrier including a resource configuration identifying subframes of the second carrier available for D2D operations. A D2D gap request may be transmitted (805) to a serving base station of a radio access network wherein the D2D gap request includes an identification of the second carrier and the resource configuration identifying subframes of the second carrier available for D2D operations. After receiving the system information and after transmitting the D2D gap request, D2D configuration information may be received (807) from the serving base station using the first carrier as a serving carrier, wherein the D2D configuration information is for the second carrier. D2D operations may be performed (809) using the second carrier based on the D2D configuration information for the second carrier.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS: 1. A method of operating a wireless terminal (UE) using a first carrier and a second carrier different than the first carrier, the method comprising: receiving (801) system information over the second carrier including a resource configuration identifying subframes of the second carrier available for device-to-device, D2D, operations; transmitting (805) a D2D gap request to a serving base station of a radio access network, RAN, wherein the D2D gap request includes an identification of the second carrier and the resource configuration identifying subframes of the second carrier available for D2D operations; after receiving the system information and after transmitting the D2D gap request, receiving (807) D2D configuration information from the serving base station of the RAN using the first carrier as a serving carrier, wherein the D2D configuration information is for the second carrier; and performing (809) D2D operations using the second carrier based on the D2D configuration information for the second carrier. 2. The method of Claim 1, further comprising: before receiving the D2D configuration information from the base station, comparing (803) subframes in which D2D operations should be performed with a discontinuous reception, DRX, pattern; wherein transmitting the D2D gap request comprises transmitting the D2D gap request responsive to collision between subframes in which D2D operations should be performed and DRX active mode subframes of the DRX pattern. 3. The method of Claim 1 : wherein receiving the system information comprises receiving the system information before receiving the D2D configuration information from the base station, while engaged in cellular communications using the first carrier of the serving base station, and responsive to determining that no receiver/transmitter chain is available for D2D operations using the second carrier; and 

 wherein transmitting the D2D gap request comprises transmitting the D2D gap request responsive to determining a difference between the resource configuration of the system information from the second carrier and a previous resource configuration from the second carrier. 4. The method of Claim 3 wherein transmitting the D2D gap request comprises transmitting the D2D gap request responsive to determining the difference between the resource configuration of the system information from the second carrier and the previous resource configuration from the second carrier, and responsive to collision between subframes in which D2D operations should be performed and DRX active mode subframes of a discontinuous reception, DRX, pattern. 5. The method of Claim 1 : wherein receiving the system information comprises receiving the system information before receiving the D2D configuration information from the base station, while engaged in cellular communications using the first carrier of the serving base station, and responsive to determining that no receiver/transmitter chain is available for D2D operations using the second carrier; and wherein transmitting the D2D gap request comprises transmitting the D2D gap request responsive to the resource configuration of the system information from the second carrier being a first resource configuration received for the second carrier since entering a current connected mode with the serving base station. 6. The method of Claim 5 wherein transmitting the D2D gap request comprises transmitting the D2D gap request responsive to the resource configuration of the system information from the second carrier being a first resource configuration received for the second carrier since entering the current connected mode with the serving base station and responsive to collision between subframes in which D2D operations should be performed and DRX active mode subframes of a discontinuous reception, DRX, pattern. 7. A method of operating a wireless terminal using a first carrier and a second carrier different than the first carrier, the method comprising: comparing (1003) subframes in which device-to-device, D2D, operations should be performed with a discontinuous reception, DRX, pattern; responsive to collision between subframes in which D2D operations should be performed and DRX active mode subframes of the DRX pattern, transmitting (1005) a D2D gap request to a serving base station of a radio access network, RAN, wherein the D2D gap request includes an identification of the second carrier and a resource configuration identifying subframes of the second carrier available for D2D operations; after comparing subframes and after transmitting the D2D gap request, receiving (1007) D2D configuration information from the serving base station of the RAN using the first carrier as a serving carrier, wherein the D2D configuration information is for the second carrier; and performing (1009) D2D operations using the second carrier based on the D2D configuration information for the second carrier. 8. The method of any of Claims 1 -7 wherein the second carrier is used by a second base station different than the first base station. 9. The method of any of Claims 1 -8 wherein performing D2D operations comprises performing D2D discovery operations. 10. A wireless terminal, wherein the wireless terminal is adapted to: receive system information over a second carrier including a resource configuration identifying subframes of the second carrier available for device-to-device, D2D, operations; transmit a D2D gap request to a serving base station of a radio access network, RAN, wherein the D2D gap request includes an identification of the second carrier and the resource configuration identifying subframes of the second carrier available for D2D operations; receive D2D configuration information from the serving base station of the RAN using a first carrier as a serving carrier after receiving the system information and after transmitting the D2D gap request, wherein the D2D configuration information is for the second carrier and the second carrier is different than the first carrier; and 

 perform D2D operations using the second carrier based on the D2D configuration information for the second carrier. 11. The wireless terminal of Claim 10, wherein the wireless terminal is further adapted to: compare subframes in which D2D operations should be performed with a discontinuous reception, DRX, pattern before receiving the D2D configuration information from the base station; wherein transmitting the D2D gap request comprises transmitting the D2D gap request responsive to collision between subframes in which D2D operations should be performed and DRX active mode subframes of the DRX pattern. 12. The wireless terminal of Claim 10: wherein receiving the system information comprises receiving the system information before receiving the D2D configuration information from the base station, while engaged in cellular communications using the first carrier of the serving base station, and responsive to determining that no receiver/transmitter chain is available for D2D operations using the second carrier; and wherein transmitting the D2D gap request comprises transmitting the D2D gap request responsive to determining a difference between the resource configuration of the system information from the second carrier and a previous resource configuration from the second carrier. 13. The wireless terminal of Claim 12 wherein transmitting the D2D gap request comprises transmitting the D2D gap request responsive to determining the difference between the resource configuration of the system information from the second carrier and the previous resource configuration from the second carrier, and responsive to collision between subframes in which D2D operations should be performed and DRX active mode subframes of a discontinuous reception, DRX, pattern. 14. The wireless terminal of Claim 10: 

 wherein receiving the system information comprises receiving the system information before receiving the D2D configuration information from the base station, while engaged in cellular communications using the first carrier of the serving base station, and responsive to determining that no receiver/transmitter chain is available for D2D operations using the second carrier; and wherein transmitting the D2D gap request comprises transmitting the D2D gap request responsive to the resource configuration of the system information from the second carrier being a first resource configuration received for the second carrier since entering a current connected mode with the serving base station. 15. The wireless terminal of Claim 14 wherein transmitting the D2D gap request comprises transmitting the D2D gap request responsive to the resource configuration of the system information from the second carrier being a first resource configuration received for the second carrier since entering the current connected mode with the serving base station and responsive to collision between subframes in which D2D operations should be performed and DRX active mode subframes of a discontinuous reception, DRX, pattern. 16. A wireless terminal, the wireless terminal comprising: a transceiver configured to provide wireless communication with one or more nodes of a radio access network, RAN; and a processor coupled with the transceiver, wherein the processor is configured to transmit and/or receive communications to/from the one or more nodes of the RAN through the transceiver, and wherein the processor is configured to, receive system information over a second carrier including a resource configuration identifying subframes of the second carrier available for device-to-device, D2D, operations; transmit a D2D gap request to a serving base station of the RAN, wherein the D2D gap request includes an identification of the second carrier and the resource configuration identifying subframes of the second carrier available for D2D operations; receive D2D configuration information from the serving base station of the RAN using a first carrier as a serving carrier after receiving the system information and after 

 transmitting the D2D gap request, wherein the D2D configuration information is for the second carrier and the second carrier is different than the first carrier; and perform D2D operations using the second carrier based on the D2D configuration information for the second carrier. 17. The wireless terminal of Claim 16, wherein the processor is further configured to, compare subframes in which D2D operations should be performed with a discontinuous reception, DRX, pattern before receiving the D2D configuration information from the base station; wherein transmitting the D2D gap request comprises transmitting the D2D gap request responsive to collision between subframes in which D2D operations should be performed and DRX active mode subframes of the DRX pattern. 18. The wireless terminal of Claim 16: wherein receiving the system information comprises receiving the system information before receiving the D2D configuration information from the base station, while engaged in cellular communications using the first carrier of the serving base station, and responsive to determining that no receiver/transmitter chain is available for D2D operations using the second carrier; and wherein transmitting the D2D gap request comprises transmitting the D2D gap request responsive to determining a difference between the resource configuration of the system information from the second carrier and a previous resource configuration from the second carrier. 19. The wireless terminal of Claim 18 wherein transmitting the D2D gap request comprises transmitting the D2D gap request responsive to determining the difference between the resource configuration of the system information from the second carrier and the previous resource configuration from the second carrier, and responsive to collision between subframes in which D2D operations should be performed and DRX active mode subframes of a discontinuous reception, DRX, pattern. 20. The wireless terminal of Claim 16: wherein receiving the system information comprises receiving the system information before receiving the D2D configuration information from the base station, while engaged in cellular communications using the first carrier of the serving base station, and responsive to determining that no receiver/transmitter chain is available for D2D operations using the second carrier; and wherein transmitting the D2D gap request comprises transmitting the D2D gap request responsive to the resource configuration of the system information from the second carrier being a first resource configuration received for the second carrier since entering a current connected mode with the serving base station. 21. The wireless terminal of Claim 20 wherein transmitting the D2D gap request comprises transmitting the D2D gap request responsive to the resource configuration of the system information from the second carrier being a first resource configuration received for the second carrier since entering the current connected mode with the serving base station and responsive to collision between subframes in which D2D operations should be performed and DRX active mode subframes of a discontinuous reception, DRX, pattern. 22. A wireless terminal (UE), the wireless terminal comprising: a system information reception module (901) configured to receive system information over a second carrier including a resource configuration identifying subframes of the second carrier available for device-to-device, D2D, operations; a D2D gap request transmission module (905) configured to transmit a D2D gap request to a serving base station of a radio access network, RAN, wherein the D2D gap request includes an identification of the second carrier and the resource configuration identifying subframes of the second carrier available for D2D operations; a D2D configuration information reception module (907) configured to receive D2D configuration information from the serving base station of the RAN using a first carrier as a serving carrier after receiving the system information and after transmitting the D2D gap request, wherein the D2D configuration information is for the second carrier and the second carrier is different than the first carrier; and 

 a D2D operations performance module (909) configured to perform D2D operations using the second carrier based on the D2D configuration information for the second carrier. 23. A wireless terminal, wherein the wireless terminal is adapted to: compare subframes in which device-to-device, D2D, operations should be performed with a discontinuous reception, DRX, pattern; transmit a D2D gap request to a serving base station of a radio access network, RAN, responsive to collision between subframes in which D2D operations should be performed and DRX active mode subframes of the DRX pattern, wherein the D2D gap request includes an identification of a second carrier and a resource configuration identifying subframes of the second carrier available for D2D operations; receive D2D configuration information from the serving base station of the RAN using a first carrier as a serving carrier after comparing subframes and after transmitting the D2D gap request, wherein the D2D configuration information is for the second carrier and the second carrier is different than the first carrier; and perform D2D operations using the second carrier based on the D2D configuration information for the second carrier. 24. A wireless terminal (UE), the wireless terminal comprising: a transceiver (301) configured to provide wireless communication with one or more nodes of a radio access network, RAN; and a processor (303) coupled with the transceiver, wherein the processor is configured to transmit and/or receive communications to/from the one or more nodes of the RAN through the transceiver, and wherein the processor is configured to, compare subframes in which device-to-device, D2D, operations should be performed with a discontinuous reception, DRX, pattern, transmit a D2D gap request to a serving base station of the RAN, responsive to collision between subframes in which D2D operations should be performed and DRX active mode subframes of the DRX pattern, wherein the D2D gap request includes an identification of a second carrier and a resource configuration identifying subframes of the second carrier available for D2D operations, 

 receive D2D configuration information from the serving base station of the RAN using a first carrier as a serving carrier after comparing subframes and after transmitting the D2D gap request, wherein the D2D configuration information is for the second carrier wherein the second carrier is different than the first carrier, and perform D2D operations using the second carrier based on the D2D configuration information for the second carrier. 25. A wireless terminal (UE), the wireless terminal comprising: a subframe comparison module (1103) configured to compare subframes in which device-to-device, D2D, operations should be performed with a discontinuous reception, DRX, pattern; a D2D gap request transmission module (1105) configured to transmit a D2D gap request to a serving base station of a radio access network, RAN, responsive to collision between subframes in which D2D operations should be performed and DRX active mode subframes of the DRX pattern, wherein the D2D gap request includes an identification of a second carrier and a resource configuration identifying subframes of the second carrier available for D2D operations; a D2D configuration information reception module (1107) configured to receive D2D configuration information from the serving base station of the RAN using a first carrier as a serving carrier after comparing subframes and after transmitting the D2D gap request, wherein the D2D configuration information is for the second carrier wherein the second carrier is different than the first carrier; and a D2D operations performance module (1109) configured to perform D2D operations using the second carrier based on the D2D configuration information for the second carrier. 26. The wireless terminal of any of Claims 10-25 wherein the second carrier is used by a second base station different than the first base station. 27. The wireless terminal of any of Claims 10-26 wherein performing D2D operations comprises performing D2D discovery operations.
